tools.name: search_repos
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories by name, description, or topic keywords using the GitHub Search API.

tools.name: view_repo
tools.description: View repository basic information and its directory structure. Includes corresponding documentation repo if available.

tools.name: list_tree
tools.description: List the directory tree of a specific path in a repository with customizable depth and traversal limits.

tools.name: read_code
tools.description: Retrieve the raw source code of specified files from within a known repository.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Perform a fast git grep inside the repository, allowing regex matching by default or substring search.
